# FAQ (deprecated — do not edit)

This file is **deprecated**. The runtime FAQ shown on the Help page now lives in
`src/content/help/faq.ts` (with `{ en, it, fr }` per string).

The single product source of truth for capabilities remains
`docs/product/capabilities.md`. **Do not edit this file** — edit `faq.ts` instead.

If a non-runtime editorial export of the FAQ is ever needed, regenerate it
from `faq.ts` rather than maintaining a parallel copy here.
